description_long: This is a dark glass wine bottle with a deep burgundy neck and a matching closure. The front of the bottle features a large, rectangular label with a white background, adorned with vivid images of pomegranates and red fruit, suggesting a fruit wine. The label includes elegant script text and additional details in smaller print, with a gold or metallic seal at the bottom. The bottle has a classic Bordeaux shape, with a long, straight neck and gently sloping shoulders. The glass appears opaque and glossy, with no visible contents from the outside. The closure is covered by a matching burgundy capsule, giving the bottle a refined and traditional appearance.
description: A dark glass wine bottle with a burgundy neck and closure, featuring a detailed fruit-themed label on the front. The bottle has a classic Bordeaux shape and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows the detailed label with pomegranate imagery, script text, and a metallic seal, as well as the full shape of the bottle.
description_view_1: This angled side view reveals the curvature of the bottle and the edge of the label, with the rest of the bottle appearing dark and unadorned.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain, dark glass surface of the bottle with no visible label or markings.
description_view_3: This side view shows the opposite edge of the label, with most of the bottle's surface remaining unmarked and dark.
attribute_label_or_branding: The front label is large, rectangular, and white with a detailed illustration of pomegranates and red fruit. It features elegant script text reading 'Nar', additional smaller text, and a metallic seal at the bottom. The label covers most of the front surface and is bordered by a thin outline.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, straight neck with a slight taper towards the top and a smooth transition to the bottle's shoulders.
